---
title: "Gapminder Analysis"
author: "Selina Baldauf"
date: today
format: html
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(gapminder)
library(ggplot2)
```

## Introduction

The **gapminder** dataset contains data about *life expectancy*, *GDP per capita*, and *population* for countries around the world.

In this analysis, we will:

- Load the gapminder data
- Look at life expectancy in 2007
- Create a plot of life expectancy vs. GDP per capita

You can find more information about the data on the [Gapminder website](https://www.gapminder.org/).

## Analysis

The gapminder data contains `r nrow(gapminder)` observations from `r length(unique(gapminder$country))` countries.

```{r}
#| echo: false
ggplot(gapminder_2007, aes(x = gdpPercap, y = lifeExp)) +
  geom_point()
```
